policy: These entries name public figures whose voices have been most frequently abused in published deepfake reports. LinguaCast refuses to voice-clone for these references regardless of consent attestation; the user must take their audio elsewhere. Update path: PR to crates/linguacast/data/refusal-list.json with a press-confirmed source for the addition.

entries.name: Joe Biden
entries.reason: Repeated robocall / political deepfake incidents (NH primary 2024).

entries.name: Donald Trump
entries.reason: Repeated political voice-clone abuse in 2024 election cycle.

entries.name: Kamala Harris
entries.reason: Documented political voice-clone abuse in 2024 election cycle.

entries.name: Barack Obama
entries.reason: Long-running deepfake test target; multiple academic + press demos.

entries.name: Scarlett Johansson
entries.reason: OpenAI voice incident (2024); long-running voice-likeness disputes.

entries.name: David Attenborough
entries.reason: Voice frequently abused in narrative-style deepfakes; subject of his own published complaints.
